routineText:
09:00 — Wake up
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
| — whole wheat bread 35g
| — 4 eggs fried with 5g of olive oil 5g
| — raw olive oil 5g
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 35g
| — milk jaouda sans lactose 35g
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 banana
| — 1 avocado (235g whole, ~157g flesh)
-----------------------

14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
| — brown rice boiled (35g raw)
| — thon isabel 3 boxes (removing oil)
| — 300g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)
-----------------------

18:00 — Black coffee · Water 1L
18:00
      — (4h) Rest
22:00

-----------------------
| 22:00 — 🌙 Dinner
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 10g mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, pistachios)
|
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep
